sentences.translation: Učenica je zamolila prijateljicu da joj pomogne.
sentences.translationEn: The student asked her friend to help her.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَفْهَمِ الدَّرْسَ الجَدِيدَ فِي الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Nije razumjela novu lekciju iz matematike.
sentences.translationEn: She didn't understand the new mathematics lesson.

sentences.translation: Sjele su zajedno i prijateljica joj je objasnila.
sentences.translationEn: They sat together and the friend explained to her.

sentences.translation: Na kraju je razumjela i zahvalila prijateljici.
sentences.translationEn: She finally understood and thanked her friend.
